---
title: "Side quests"
description: >-
  Hobby projects, experiments and interests that do not fit a CV heading:
  gw2timer, digital art, tabletop games, and things learned in public.
pagetitle: "Side quests"
toc: true
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
Projects that are not the main work.
:::

## Shipped

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
### gw2timer <span class="status-badge status-maintained">maintained</span>
A lightweight timer for tracking dynamic world events in *Guild Wars 2*.

::: {.tag-row}
[JavaScript]{.pill} [Web]{.pill} [Personal]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/nemitheasura/gw2timer){.btn-ghost}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
### This website <span class="status-badge status-active">active</span>
Built with Quarto, deployed from GitHub Actions. The source is public.

::: {.tag-row}
[Quarto]{.pill} [SCSS]{.pill} [GitHub Actions]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/nemitheasura/nemitheasura.github.io){.btn-ghost}
:::
:::

## Experiments

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
#### Generative pattern studies
Sketches in code, using a plotting grammar for things that are not data.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.tag} [Generative]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
#### Reading nanopore signal by eye
Looking at enough raw traces to predict what the classifier will say before
running it.

::: {.tag-row}
[Signal]{.tag} [Intuition]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
#### Python, in public
Postgraduate coursework, done in the open.

::: {.tag-row}
[Python]{.tag} [Learning]{.tag}
:::
:::
:::

## Interests

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-brush"></i></span>

#### Digital art
Character and creature work, mostly fantasy. Gallery on the
[Illustrations](illustrations/index.qmd) page.
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-dice-5"></i></span>

#### Games and fantasy
Tabletop RPGs, computer RPGs, and secondary-world fiction.
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-music-note-beamed"></i></span>

#### Music
Rock, metal and classical.
:::
:::

## Things I would work on given a spare month

::: {.highlight-box .reveal}
An interactive squiggle explorer; an open dataset of hand-annotated tails for
benchmarking; a Polish-language introduction to long-read sequencing.
:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-ghost" href="illustrations/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-images"></i> Illustrations</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> Software</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="contact.qmd"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact</a>
:::
